# Queries for the StorageMoverCopyLogsFailed table

For information on using these queries in the Azure portal, see [Log Analytics tutorial](/azure/azure-monitor/logs/log-analytics-tutorial). For the REST API, see [Query](/azure/azure-monitor/logs/api/overview).

### View copy logs

View the copy logs of job runs, and optionally filter by specific job run name.

```query
StorageMoverCopyLogsFailed
//| where JobRunName = "<your job run name>" // Fill in the placeholder and uncomment this line to filter by a specific job run
| project-away JobRunName
| order by TimeGenerated asc
| limit 100
```
